modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty accessing and using D2L as a student.

full_description_text: El usuario está tratando de usar D2L, pero no sabe cómo hacerlo. Durante la llamada, mencionó que tiene problemas para navegar en la plataforma. No está claro si hay un error específico o si simplemente no entiende las funciones disponibles.
